head: a7ad40b25285d2ef94824c4e34b50f768bb7d386

false_positive_guards_applied: fallback-aware: var(--x,default) NOT counted as broken
dynamic-set excluded: setProperty('--x',...) + --x-${} prefixes from block-factory.js/zoom/preset/tbl/sel/tfx
pending != dead: newly added --ui-* migration tokens classified pending
keyframe from/to + percent steps excluded from duplicate-selector count
@media-scoped overrides separated from real top-level duplicates (0 found this run)

headline.coverage_formula: var()-bearing value declarations / total value declarations

root_cause_detail: css/design-tokens.css holds an orphaned semantic token layer (--bg-*, --color-*, --space-*, --radius-*, --p-* palette chain, --content-*, --icon-*) while the live UI layer migrated to a parallel --ui-* namespace defined in css/editor-base.css :root (--ui-accent used 200x, --ui-border 252x, --ui-text 311x). All 68 dead-real tokens sit in design-tokens.css; design-tokens.css :root is itself defined twice — a symptom of the same dualization.

findings.note: Prior FIX (var(--ui-border)NNN) verified resolved. Raw re-grep 'var\([^)]*\)[0-9]' across css/ returns 0. Prior scan's editor-panels.css:561 (var(--ui-border)3) now reads a clean closed var(--ui-border). No malformed var() declarations remain.

Every var(--x) with no fallback resolves: either defined in CSS, or written dynamically via JS setProperty / prefix templates. Prior scan's broken_undef list (--tbl-*, --inv-zoom, --ui-scale, --var-color, --color-name, --page-pady, --cpmt-bg-alpha, --ui-text-*, --ui-border-hi, --ui-accent-primary-active) all confirmed as JS-driven (block-factory.js / zoom / preset / picker) — false positives under guard #2, not broken.

Defined, zero var() references, never JS-set. Orphaned semantic+palette layer superseded by --ui-* in editor-base.css. The --p-* palette chain is a cascade (palette feeds semantic, both now unreferenced).
Newly added --ui-* migration tokens, defined but not yet consumed. Classified pending (guard #3), NOT dead — awaiting hardcoded-value migration.

Defined in CSS and written via JS setProperty but never read through var() — write-side live, read-side dead. Reported separately from dead-real; not a runtime bug. Likely leftover from preset-driven theming whose consumers were refactored out.

biggest_cluster.note: comp-shelf panel block defined 2x (occurrences span lines 975/993 and the duplicated block at 1369/1386/1390+, ~215 lines). Some sub-selectors (.comp-shelf-panel.open, ::-webkit-scrollbar*, :focus/::placeholder) hit 3x.

findings.note: All 66 are genuine top-level redefinitions (>=2 occurrences outside @media/@keyframes). design-tokens.css :root 2x reinforces the token-dualization root cause.
editor-blocks.css carries 48% of all !important — specificity-war hotspot, consistent with its 9 duplicate-selector overrides.
Three files dominate CSS weight; editor-extra.css size inflated by the duplicated comp-shelf block.

area_summary.detail: 68/68 dead-real tokens + :root 2x. Entire semantic/palette layer orphaned by --ui-* migration.
:root --ui-* layer (heavily referenced). Hosts 6 pending migration tokens.
comp-shelf panel block defined twice (~215 lines), 31 dup selectors.
0 broken, 0 malformed after deterministic re-scan. Prior var(--ui-border)NNN FIX confirmed.
